title: Manage biodynamic production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage biodynamic production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare a plan for a biodynamic farming enterprise

pcs.text: Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risk and develop controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risk and develop controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risk and develop controls according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify requirements for biodynamic certification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify requirements for biodynamic certification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify requirements for biodynamic certification.

pcs.text: Develop goals and plan for a biodynamic enterprise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop goals and plan for a biodynamic enterprise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop goals and plan for a biodynamic enterprise.

pcs.text: Develop marketing plans for biodynamic produce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop marketing plans for biodynamic produce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop marketing plans for biodynamic produce.

pcs.text: Investigate and implement trials for biodynamic agriculture and products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and implement trials for biodynamic agriculture and products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and implement trials for biodynamic agriculture and products.

pcs.text: Record outcomes of trials and incorporate into business plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record outcomes of trials and incorporate into business plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record outcomes of trials and incorporate into business plans.

pcs.text: Develop and implement biodynamic production plan according to biodynamic principles and organic farming strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement biodynamic production plan according to biodynamic principles and organic farming strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement biodynamic production plan according to biodynamic principles and organic farming strategies.
